base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_energy_tank — a pickup_item (health_pickup) from 1986 metroid. Energy Tank — +100 max HP permanent upgrade. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Energy Tank — +100 max HP permanent upgrade; 6 scattered across planet Zebes
